name: NexCampus v2.3.2
changelog: HiDPI Solar System — crisp rendering on all displays, no more blur
Hover glow on planets + orbit trails for better interactivity
In-app self-update — download & install from the About page
Canvas aspect-ratio fix prevents stretching distortion
Solar System overhaul: zoom/pan, Milky Way, asteroid belt, Saturn rings, pulsing Sun, dwarf planets (Ceres & Pluto), tabbed info panel, enhanced planet data, 34 rotating facts
Inline Find/Replace bar in Notes (Ctrl+F) replaces ugly prompt() dialogs
Styled notifications — error/success/info types replace all 34 alert() calls
Startup crash fix — missing 'import time' bug resolved
Stale server processes killed on startup (no more 'connection refused')
Server stays alive when opening in browser instead of pywebview
Uninstall scripts for Linux and Windows
Version comparison fixed for proper update detection
